title: How to 10x Your Claude Code Projects (Karpathy's Method)
summary: Austin Marchese breaks down three strategies attributed to Andrej Karpathy for increasing productivity with Claude Code: LLM Knowledge Bases, Auto-Research, and Context Engineering. The video offers a framework for applying these principles to code projects with the goal of achieving 10x output improvement.
